zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Winter於1475年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特時，他的父親Roger Wynter30歲，母親Elizabeth Hungerford30歲。他與Elizabeth Wyrrall在英國武斯特斯爾丁頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾丁頓享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Winter于1475年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特时，他的父亲Roger Wynter30岁，母亲Elizabeth Hungerford30岁。他与Elizabeth Wyrrall在英国武斯特斯爾丁頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾丁頓享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Winter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old English) personal name Winter (Old English Wintra), originally a nickname from the word for ‘winter’ and perhaps still a nickname (see 2 below) in the period of surname formation.
English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English winter, a variant of Middle English, Anglo-Norman French viniter, vinter ‘wine merchant’.
Irish: Anglicized form (part translation) of Gaelic Mac Giolla-Gheimhridh ‘son of the lad of winter’, from geimhreadh ‘winter’. This name is also Anglicized McAlivery.

variants.name: Winters
meanings: Dutch and German: patronymic from   Winter  .
English: variant of Winter , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Mac Giolla Gheimhridh ‘son of the lad of winter’, from geimhreadh ‘winter’. Compare Winter 4.

variants.name: Winther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Niels, Aksel, Anders, Bent, Jorgen, Lars, Nels, Sven.  German Gerhardt, Kurt, Otto.
German, Danish, and Swedish: variant of   Winter  .

variants.name: Winterberg
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called with Middle High German winter ‘winter’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name composed of German Winter + Berg ‘mountain, hill’.

variants.name: Winterman
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex): occupational name or status name denoting a servant of a man named   Winter   1.
English (Kent and Middlesex): alternatively, perhaps a nickname denoting a person with a cold, wintry appearance or disposition.

English (Kent and Middlesex): occasionally perhaps an occupational name for a wine merchant or a wine merchant's servant, from a variant of Middle English and Anglo-Norman French viniter, vinter ‘wine merchant’ (modern English vintner) + man ‘man’.

variants.name: De Winter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Urbain, Marcel.
Dutch; Flemish (also Dewinter): variant of Winter + definite article de, particularly as a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or tavern named with the season.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Winter was born in 1475, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Roger Wynter, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Hungerford, was 30. He married Elizabeth Wyrrall in Huddington, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1550, in Huddington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Winter est né en 1475, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Wynter, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hungerford, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wyrrall à Huddington, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1550, à Huddington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Winter 1475 in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Wynter 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hungerford 30. Er hat in Huddington, Worcestershire, England Elizabeth Wyrrall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1550 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Huddington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Winter è nato il nel 1475 nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Roger Wynter, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hungerford, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wyrrall nel Huddington, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1550, nel Huddington, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Winterが1475年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで生まれた時，父Roger Wynterは30歳，母Elizabeth Hungerfordは30歳であった。イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアハッドイントンでElizabeth Wyrrallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアハッドイントンで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Winter(이)가 1475년 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Wynter(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hungerford(은)는 30세였다. 그는 영국 워스스터실르 허딩턴에서 Elizabeth Wyrrall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 허딩턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Winter nasceu em 1475, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Wynter, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hungerford, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wyrrall em Huddington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1550, em Huddington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Winter родился в 1475 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Wynter было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hungerford, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wyrrall в местности худдингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1550 г. в местности худдингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Winter nació en 1475, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Wynter, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hungerford, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wyrrall en Huddington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1550, en Huddington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
